title: Weekday lunch discount
summary: Save on a relaxed lunch visit from Monday to Friday.
description: Guests receive a discount on selected lunch dishes during weekday service.
terms: Offer applies to dine-in lunch orders and cannot be combined with other promotions.
body: Plan an easy midday visit with a lower-priced lunch selection prepared for regular weekday service.
The offer is designed for guests who want a quicker meal while still choosing from the restaurant's core dishes.
highlights: Available every weekday during lunch hours
Applies to selected dine-in menu items
Simple terms guests can understand before ordering

title: Family dinner offer
summary: Enjoy a comfortable evening meal with a special offer for family visits.
description: Families can receive a discount on selected dinner sets, shared dishes, or children’s menu items.
terms: Offer applies to dine-in orders for groups with children and may depend on menu availability.
body: A family dinner should feel easy, warm, and comfortable for guests of different ages.
This offer helps families plan an evening visit with shared dishes, simple choices, and a more relaxed final bill.
highlights: Good for parents visiting with children
Can apply to shared dishes or kids menu
Best for calm evening family meals

title: Birthday celebration bonus
summary: Make a birthday visit feel more special with a small bonus from the venue.
description: Birthday guests may receive a complimentary dessert, drink, or discount when celebrating with a reservation.
terms: Guest may need to show proof of birthday. Offer applies with advance reservation and depends on venue rules.
body: A birthday does not always need a large banquet to feel memorable.
This bonus gives guests a simple reason to celebrate at the venue, whether they come for dinner, coffee, or a small gathering with friends.
highlights: Works for small and large celebrations
Can include dessert, drink, or discount

title: Hotel guest restaurant discount
summary: Hotel guests can enjoy special prices in the restaurant during their stay.
description: Guests staying at the hotel may receive a discount on selected restaurant orders, breakfasts, or drinks.
terms: Offer applies only to registered hotel guests and selected restaurant items.
body: A hotel stay becomes more convenient when guests can enjoy food and drinks without leaving the property.
This discount connects accommodation and restaurant service, giving guests a simple benefit during their visit.
highlights: Useful for breakfast, lunch, or dinner

title: Coffee and dessert combo
summary: Take a small break with a special price for coffee and dessert together.
description: Guests can order selected coffee and dessert combinations at a better price during quieter hours.
terms: Offer applies to selected coffee and dessert combinations while available.
body: Coffee time is a simple way to turn an ordinary afternoon into a pleasant pause.
This combo is designed for guests who want a warm drink, a small dessert, and a comfortable table without planning a full meal.
highlights: Good for cafes, restaurants, and hotel lounges
